TIME WARP

PLYMOUTH OR JAMESTOWN

Two boats. Two reasons. Two endings.
Pick a side. Pick a person. Live what they lived.

Skip the tutorial — I've been here before
CHOOSE ANOTHER ROUTE
Six lives crossing the Atlantic between 1607 and 1640.

JAMESTOWN

Riches. Glory. Tobacco. The South.
JOHN SMITHSoldier of fortune. Took food at gunpoint.
JOHN ROLFETobacco entrepreneur. Husband of Pocahontas.
POWHATANParamount chief. Watched it all arrive.

PLYMOUTH

Faith. Family. Corn. The North.
WILLIAM BRADFORDPilgrim governor. Wrote it all down.
SQUANTOCaptured. Spain. Returned to ruins.
MASSASOITWampanoag sachem. Kept the peace 50 years.
